subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The winds of tests blow turbulently from every direction, and the whirlwind of trials is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر عهد اریاح امتحانست که از هر جهت در هیجانست و گردباد افتتانست که
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
